EventDescriptions.EventDescription: An attack of the "{subject.name}" type from host {src.host} to host {dst.host} is detected on host {event_src.host}
An attack of the "{subject.name}" type to host {dst.host} is detected on host {event_src.host}
An attack of the "{subject.name}" type is detected on host {event_src.host}
An attack of the "{subject.name}" type from host {src.host} is detected on host {event_src.host}
